expectations.text: Identifies hidden complexity such as roles, permissions, frontend/backend enforcement, and security boundaries
expectations.evidence: Response discusses role defaults, route/page access, server-side API protection, 401/403 behavior, and need for auth/session/API layers.
Response explicitly says it did not implement RBAC and project snapshot shows only README.md.

expectations.text: Clearly recommends using brainstorming or a spec workflow

expectations.text: Explains why the request is not a small localized change
expectations.evidence: Explains there is no app code, routing layer, auth/session implementation, API layer, framework config, or role model to modify.
